overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima depicting a samurai character exploring a traditional Japanese temple complex during cherry blossom season. The character walks from a rural dirt path through temple gates and courtyards before ascending into a forested mountain trail.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path bordered by hedges and wooden fences toward the temple complex

entered.detail: traditional wooden temple structure with dark tiled roof visible in the distance
large sakura tree with white and pink blossoms
simple wooden post fence lining the right side of the path
tall trimmed hedge forming a green wall along the path
snow-capped mountain visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rural dirt path flanked by hedges and wooden fences, with a traditional Japanese temple complex visible ahead. Cherry blossom trees frame the approach while a distant snow-capped mountain rises against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple main gate entrance with stone steps

events.description: character enters the shadowed interior of the main temple gate structure
emerges from gate shadow into the sunlit courtyard beyond

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps up to and passing through the main temple gate structure

entered.detail: large traditional wooden temple gate with curved roof and stone base
traditional stone tōrō lantern flanking the entrance
weathered stone stairs leading up to the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and ascends the stone steps of the main temple gate, passing through its shadowed interior before emerging into a sunlit courtyard. Traditional stone lanterns flank the entrance as the wooden gate structure dominates the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with auxiliary wooden buildings

events.description: character turns right to navigate around courtyard building

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit courtyard navigating between wooden temple structures and garden elements

entered.detail: auxiliary wooden temple structure with dark beams and paper screens
wooden torii gate marking the exit to the forest path

segments.scene_description: Navigating the temple courtyard, the character walks across stone paving past wooden auxiliary buildings and trimmed garden bushes. A torii gate becomes visible in the distance marking the transition to the forest beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: torii gate marking transition to sacred forest path

events.description: passes through wooden torii gate leaving temple complex for forest trail

agents.ego_description: walking through torii gate transitioning from temple grounds to forested mountain path

entered.detail: tall pine and cypress trees marking the beginning of the forest trail

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through the wooden torii gate, leaving the temple courtyard behind. The environment transitions from manicured grounds to a natural forest trail as tall trees begin to surround the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest mountain trail with stone steps

events.description: begins ascending stone steps on forested hillside

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps along winding forest trail surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: rough stone steps embedded in the forest trail for ascending the hillside

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the forest trail as it winds uphill through dense woodland. The character ascends stone steps surrounded by tall trees with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy, with occasional cherry blossoms visible among the evergreens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rural approach through a traditional temple complex and into a dense mountain forest. It begins on a dirt path flanked by hedges and cherry blossoms, moving toward a distant snow-capped mountain under a clear blue sky. As the camera ascends the stone steps of the main temple gate, it passes through a shadowed interior before emerging into a sunlit courtyard filled with stone lanterns and manicured gardens. The scene then shifts as the character navigates past wooden auxiliary buildings toward a distant torii gate, passing through it to leave the groomed grounds behind. Finally, the environment transitions into a natural woodland trail, winding uphill through tall trees and dappled sunlight as the path ascends further into the forest.
